reviews.comment:
En la estación de servicio atienden muy bien pero siempre hay mucha cola. Si no sos socio del ACA cobran la ficha para inflar los neumáticos.  La cafetería es muy amplia y agradable, muy buena atención,  precios un tanto caros. El lavadero de autos es bueno y económico,  uno de los pocos que lavan chasis. La gomería también presta un buen servicio. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station is excellent, but there's always a long line. If you're not an ACA member, they charge a token to inflate your tires. The cafeteria is spacious and pleasant, with very good service, though the prices are a bit high. The car wash is good and inexpensive, one of the few that washes chassis. The tire shop also provides good service. Recommended.

El ACA ? Para atrás. Atrasa.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow at the gas station. I had to give up on adding points due to a problem with their computer system. The ACA? It's backwards. It's outdated.

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre...todas las estaciones YPF y en especial las del ACA no son un punto de carga de combustible por personal amable y capacitado sino que además ofrecen baños limpios.. un lugar donde tomar un café o hacer alguna compra de último momento en un lugar agradable

(Translated by Google)
As always...all YPF stations, and especially those of the ACA, are not just fuel stops with friendly and trained staff, but also offer clean restrooms, a place to have a coffee, or do some last-minute shopping in a pleasant atmosphere.
